metadata.description: Core development workflow plugins for Claude Code with properly registered agents, Task tool orchestration, and architecture skills

plugins.name: feature-development
plugins.description: Systematic feature development with 7-phase workflow: discovery, codebase exploration, clarifying questions, architecture design (SOLID, Clean Architecture, Design Patterns, DDD), implementation, QA-DEV-REVIEW loops, and summary

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Code review with focused investigation and parallel specialized reviewers for security, architecture, performance, and bug detection

plugins.name: bugfix
plugins.description: Systematic bug fixing with root cause analysis, fix implementation, and test verification

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Quality Assurance workflows with test writing, test execution, and browser testing via Playwright MCP for unit, integration, and E2E testing
